section_name: Court to forward license of person adjudicated incapacitated to department
text: Whenever a person is adjudicated to be mentally or physically incapacitated pursuant to s. 744.331 , the court shall require such person to surrender to it all driver licenses held by such person, and the court shall forward the same, together with a record of the adjudication, to the department.
markdown:
### Chapter 322. Driver Licenses
##### § 322.2505 — Court to forward license of person adjudicated incapacitated to department

Whenever a person is adjudicated to be mentally or physically incapacitated pursuant to s. 744.331 , the court shall require such person to surrender to it all driver licenses held by such person, and the court shall forward the same, together with a record of the adjudication, to the department.

subsections.text: Whenever a person is adjudicated to be mentally or physically incapacitated pursuant to s. 744.331 , the court shall require such person to surrender to it all driver licenses held by such person, and the court shall forward the same, together with a record of the adjudication, to the department.
